characters.name: Phoebus Abel
characters.description: Phoebus AbelGenderMaleHair colorBlueEye colorBlueAffiliationCorona Saints(As their Leader)RankDeities, Sun God(self-proclaimed)FamilyAthena(Sister)Zeus(Father)StatusDeceasedVoiced byTaichiro Hirokawa(Japanese) Zeus(Father) Phoebus Abel(太陽神フォェボス・アベル,Taiyō-shin Foebosu Aberu), is a deity of Mount Olympus and the older brother ofAthenawho came back to life in the modern era. He seeks to find his sister's latest incarnation and bring her back with him, in addition intending to obliterate the Earth. He appears as the main antagonist of the movieSaint Seiya: Legend of Crimson Youth. His nature is portrayed in most of the film as a calm and kind god, with a serene and stoic gaze, whose hobby is playing a golden harp. He is also proved to be a cruel and ruthless god towards those he considers inferior. He considered himself powerful enough to name himself God of the Sun, defying the Olympians in the mythological age. He is seen to be a rather affectionate and kind towards Saori and even seemed delighted to be reunited with her. He placed a flower in her hair and sheds himself from his stoic gaze to smile brightly in her presence. He showed her great appreciation towards her refers to as his "younger sister" due to their mythological connection. He even cried for her when he killed her, in response to her rebellion against him. Even in her death, he speaks to her and often kisses her cheek. This is more than likely due to their separation for eons. Despite being the antagonist, Abel is somewhat a tragic villain. He was stripped from his birthright and, when he attempted to claim it, the Gods waged war against him and cast him into isolation, which is the leading factor to him being rather detached and distant towards those who are not his knights and his sister. When Saori betrays him before he ends her life, he is crying and continuously asking her why she would betray him. When Hyoga approached, he allowed him passage and even asked if he could make an ice coffin for his sister to preserve the beauty of his sister and utilized his cosmo to guide her to Elysium, showing even despite the betrayal he still cared for her. Later, when Seiya hesitates to kill him, he moved away from Saori in means to give him no means to hesitate. Even after that, Abel continues the destruction to force Seiya's hand, however, he acknowledged that he was scared of dying despite being a God. The final exhibition of his kind yet tragic nature is even in death, he removed his statue that was the last proof of his existence and in its stead built a statue in his fallen temple of a younger version of himself and Saori playing together. In theFinal Holy War / Warriors of Armageddon,his personality is completely different from his previous nature. He seems sadistic and finding pleasure in destroying the world, whereas in the previous movie, he was not doing it out of any sort of desire but rather because he felt as if he had to because humanity was polluting the world.

characters.name: Abzu
characters.description: Abzu,ApsuorApzuis the main antagonist of the 1st season ofSaint Seiya Ω.MedeaandPisces Amorprey onPegasus Kōgato awaken Abzu, their true master. Ludwig, now Mars, leads a battle against Athena and her Saints. His Four Heavenly Kings were defeated by Athena, and he finds himself in trouble against Seiya. Medea, who was in the Darkness Ruins, prayed for Abzu, God of Darkness to come to their rescue. A dark meteor then left a pile of Darkness floating in the cosmo and crashed on Earth. Saori tries somehow to contain it, and save two babies, Kōga and Aria. However, Athena Cloth crack and the meteorite is powered by a strange energy boost, Athena couldn't do anything to stop it and the star explodes against the surface. Darkness sprung up not only in Mars, but in Kōga too. Saori saves Kōga by infusing her light into him. However, Mars trimmed armor changed by Darkness, and takes the opportunity to leave with Aria. The battle of Sanctuary have passed and the destruction of Earth has begun. Kōga and Eden confront Amor on Planet Mars, and manages to capture Koga and stole his darkness and insert in to the Galaxy Mail, concentrate of Darkness who had grown up in Mars. But Kōga does not succumb to darkness and uses this apparent resurgence of power to stand up to Amor. Their fight takes them near the tree where Saori is a prisoner, and an illusion of Medea was quick to sink the Saint in despair thinking that Saori died before his eyes. The Dark Cosmo within Kōga wins unprecedented intensity and it can no longer repress. Darkness envelops his Cloth and body consciousness fades and Abzu takes possession of the Koga body.

characters.name: Acheron Charon
characters.description: Acheron CharonAge38GenderMaleDate of birthOctober 2NationalityNaples, ItalyAffiliationHadesClassSpectersRankCelestial Star SpectersClothAcheron SurpliceAttacksRolling OarEddying Current CrasherHeight183cmWeight65kgBlood typeOStatusDeceasedVoiced bySaitō Shirō Acheron Charon(天間星アケローンのカロン,Tenkansei Akerōn no Karon) is one ofHades' 108Specter. Just like his name says he transports the dead over the river Acheron. His power lies in theCelestial Spatial Star. Charon's appearance is similar to the design he gave to Juggler, a character inB't X, another manga by Kurumada. Both Charon and Juggler are guarding the entrance of the next stage. Charon (TLC)

characters.name: Acheron Nyan
characters.description: Acheron Nyanof the Celestial Spatial Star is a Specter that appears in Next Dimension. Acheron Nyan was nearAcheronwaiting to collect the soul ofTaurus Ox. However arrivedOphiuchus Odysseusthat resurrects Taurus Ox and pays Nyan for the toubles. After the twoGold Saintsgoes away Nyan confused reflects about what was happening.

characters.name: Acting Principal
characters.description: Acting PrincipalGenderMaleAffiliationAthenaClassSaintRankVice Principal Of PalaestraVoiced byNaomi Kusumi Acting Principal(Gakuenchō Dairi) is one of the officers in charge of overseeingPalaestra. The acting principal stands in forPrincipal Ioniawhen he is absent from Palestra. Despite his bureaucratic appearance, the acting principal is a former Saint. He is able to perceive the explosion caused byMarson the remote island whereKōgalived and immediately sendsLionet Sōmato investigate.

characters.name: Agasha
characters.description: AgashaGenderFemaleNationalityGreekAffiliationAthenaVoiced byKana Asumi Agasha(アガシャ,Agasha?)is a young girl fromRodorio village, daughter of a florist. She is protected byPisces Albafica. Agasha is a young girl with long brown hair she keeps styled in a ponytail. She usually wears a lilac dress and traditional Greek sandals. After an encounter with Albafica, she began wearing one of his harmless roses on the front of her dress. She is a kind, helpful, and hardworking girl. While she does not judge others, she at times mistakes their personalities are opposite of what they really are. After coming to understand Albafica, she grew fond of him and heavily mourned his death.
characters.personality_section: She is a kind, helpful, and hardworking girl. While she does not judge others, she at times mistakes their personalities are opposite of what they really are. After coming to understand Albafica, she grew fond of him and heavily mourned his death.

characters.name: Ahimsa
characters.description: AhimsaGenderMaleNationalityIndia Ahimsa (アヒムサ,Ahimusa) is a thief from India in the Virgo Chapter ofShiori Teshirogi's manga,Saint Seiya: The Lost Canvas Gaiden. Ahimsa was a thief that lived in India and stole the possessions of the dead, at one time stealing the gold leaves covering the Buddha statues in order to support his sick mother. Ahimsa was captured and sent to an Ascetic monastery as punishment for his theft. Ahimsa, resistant to the ideology of ascetics, metVirgo Asmita, who, regardless of his afflictions and injuries, was still a child seeking enlightenment. The meeting changed the vision Ahimsa had of the world. Fifteen years later, Ahimsa dies and ends up in hell, strangely keeping his own will.Skeleton guardsare having fun torturing him, when the adult Virgo Asmita arrives and saves his old friend, although obviously incapable of bringing him back to the world of the living.Kagebōshithen offers Ahimsa the chance to become aSpecter, the Star of Oppression, regenerating his damaged body and promising him eternal life in exchange for following theAtavaka Specter. The negotiations are quickly interrupted by Asmita, who gets rid of the Specter and decides to go to the famous Atavaka himself.

characters.name: Alchemy Glove Mira
characters.description: Alchemy Glove MiraGenderMaleAffiliationSaturnClassPallasitesSaturniansRankPallasites Unrank ClassPallasites First ClassClothAlchemy Glove ChronotectorAttacksElement RejectionFire WallUltimate RejectionStatusDeceasedVoiced byUeda Yūji Alchemy Glove Mira(アルケミーグローブのミラー,Arukemī Gurōbu no Mirā) is a Pallasite who does not feel he fits in the ranking systems of the others and in fact does not fight for Pallas at all but rather for his own enjoyment, and particularly enjoys destroying the Saints' Cloths.When Saturn awakens, Mira reveals himself as a Pallasite First Class just like Europe and rejoins his master with him. Mira is briefly seen holding a battle without using His Cronotech against Silver Saint, Menkar, which defeat and destroy their Cloth using his glove. Later, appears before Koga, Haruto, Ryuho and Subaru destroying the breast and Armor helmet Subaru and destroying the right shoulder as well as Pegasus Cloth also destroys the legendary Dragon Shield. In the battle against Mira, Haruto sacrifices his cloth to give a blow to Pallasite, which deflects the last minute, which makes it is very angry with the attack, without fulfilling his promise to retire. He was preparing to launch his deadly attack into a ball of energy, but is interrupted by Europe, which says do not despair for the Saints, to save energies for future battles and then leaves the battlefield.Reveal Cloth Stone also has other Saints who fought against him, becoming his trophies of victory.

characters.name: Alcor Zeta Bud
characters.description: Alcor Zeta BudAge20GenderMaleNationalityAsgardAffiliationOdinClassWarriorRankShadowGod WarriorsClothAlcor Zeta RobeTrainingAsgardAttacksShadow Viking Tiger ClawHeight185cmWeight72kgFamilyMizar Syd(younger twin brother)StatusDeceasedVoiced byYū Mizushima Alcor Zeta Bud(ゼータ星アルコルのバド,Zēta-sei Arukoru no Bado) is a Shadow God Warrior of Asgard in the series Saint Seiya, by Masami Kurumada. Bud has an identical appearance to Syd. He is tall, standing a little taller than Syd, with a lean but muscular build and medium length, light teal colored hair. Opposite of Syd, Bud's cloth is white with a white and red cape but does not hold one of the Odin Sapphires. Bud is rather cold and calculating. He has shown great resentment toward Syd and his birth parents for believing the superstition of twins being a sign of bad fortune and leaving him to die. Although he greatly disliked Syd for having the life he should have had and becoming a God Warrior for Asgard he also showed brotherly concern when Syd was in difficult situations.

characters.name: Alexei
characters.description: AlexeiAge16GenderMaleDate of birthJune 27NationalitySiberiaAffiliationTemplate:BluegradClassWarriorRankBlue WarriorTrainingBluegradAttacksBlue ImpulseHeight1.84 mWeight80 kgBlood typeABFamilyNatássia (Sister) Alexeiis the elder son of Piotr, the ruler of Bluegrad, but also the leader of the order of theBlue Warriors(written with the kanji 氷戦士, meaning Ice Warriors), and also the elder brother of a girl namedNatassia. He and his Blue Warriors are introduced byKurumadain vol.13 of his manga, in the short story arc he dedicated toHyoga, Koori no Kuni no Natassia Hen (The Chapter of Natassia, from the Lands of Ice), thus, in the original series, they are manga-only.

characters.name: Alioth Epsilon Fenrir
characters.description: Alioth Epsilon FenrirAge14GenderMaleNationalityAsgardAffiliationOdinClassWarriorRankGod WarriorsClothAlioth Epsilon Fenrir RobeTrainingAsgardAttacksWolf Cruelty ClawNorthern Wolf Pack PunchHeight177cmWeight60kgStatusDeceasedVoiced byToshihiko SekiNaoko Watanabe (child) Alioth Epsilon Fenrir(イプシロン星アリオトのフェンリル,Ipushiron Arioto no Fenriru)is one of seven God Warriors of Asgard in the series Saint Seiya of Masami Kurumada. Fenrirsent his wolves afterShiryu, confident they could deal with the Dragon Saint. When Shiryu assaulted his wolves in retaliation, Fenrir was enraged at their treatment, promising to deal with Shiryu himself. As the fight continued, Fenrir pushed Shiryu into a corner with numerous assaults from his Wolf Cruelty Claw. Shiryu tried to fight using his Rising Dragon Lord, but Fenrir had seen through it already and evaded it.

characters.name: Alone (LC)
characters.description: Alone (Hades)Age15GenderMaleDate of birthDecember 24Astrological signCapricornNationalityKingdom of Naples (today part of Italy)Hair colorBlond (Black when possessed by Hades)Eye colorBlueAffiliationHimself (as painter)Hades, King of theUnderworldClassHostRankHost of HadesClothHades's SurpliceTrainingHades's powersHeight167 cmWeight54 kgBlood typeOFamilySasha(Sister)Pegasus Tenma (TLC)(Best Friend)Voiced byHiro ShimonoAlone(アローン,Arōn) is a young painter and alsoHades's host in the 18th century, as he possesses the purest soul in that era. Pegasus Tenma (TLC)(Best Friend) Alone's character design Alone possessed the qualities of every ideal host ofHades, King of the Underworld. He had a pure heart, and was gentle and kind to everyone. Alone is capable of fighting for justice and is a pacifist, preferring to resolve issues without violence, resemblingShun. He had demonstrated to be an animal lover as well as a very courageous, as he saved a puppy from the hands of other boys in his village, even giving them his bottle of red paint in order to save the puppy. Additionally, he is also willing to put himself in danger to protect those close to him from harm's way and from dangerous situations. However, despite his kind and understanding nature, Alone does have a limit to his tolerance and is capable of holding grudges, as shown when he harbors hatred forSagittarius Sisyphus, as seen when the god Hades took Alone's body openly claims to sense Alone holding a grudge against Sisyphus Sagittarius, presumably from what Hades managed to see first-hand from Alone's memories, which contained the Sagittarius Gold Saint taking Sasha away from the orphanage. When he became the host of Hades, Alone goes though drastic changes in personality. He becomes much more merciless and sadistic, as seen in Alone's belief in "death as salvation", and he was willing to kill manySaints,Specters, and innocent people for his own purposes. He possesses a menacing and overwhelming dark cosmos that compliments his position as the King of the Underworld's host. Alone goes as far as believing himself to be an evil human, which the Dream GodHypnosagrees with him; admitting he never saw any human as malicious as Alone, before overwhelming and rendering the last bit of Alone's human nature into a state of eternal drowsiness and incapacitation. The possible reason behind why Alone's cruelty was creating a world where there is no war and suffering, which was ironic, since Alone hypocritically murdered many, including hisbest friend, in order to achieve his goal. Out of all the characters in the series, Alone only seems to resentSisyphus, as seen when the Hades took over Alone's body, he was able to sense Alone harboring a large amount of negative emotions against the Sagittarius Saint. During his time as Hades's host, Alone demonstrates an intense authority over theSpecters, expecting them to only follow his orders. He does not approve of disobedience or failure to carry out his commands

He becomes much more merciless and sadistic, as seen in Alone's belief in "death as salvation", and he was willing to kill manySaints,Specters, and innocent people for his own purposes. characters.name: Alone (LC)
characters.description: Alone (Hades)Age15GenderMaleDate of birthDecember 24Astrological signCapricornNationalityKingdom of Naples (today part of Italy)Hair colorBlond (Black when possessed by Hades)Eye colorBlueAffiliationHimself (as painter)Hades, King of theUnderworldClassHostRankHost of HadesClothHades's SurpliceTrainingHades's powersHeight167 cmWeight54 kgBlood typeOFamilySasha(Sister)Pegasus Tenma (TLC)(Best Friend)Voiced byHiro ShimonoAlone(アローン,Arōn) is a young painter and alsoHades's host in the 18th century, as he possesses the purest soul in that era. Pegasus Tenma (TLC)(Best Friend) Alone's character design Alone possessed the qualities of every ideal host ofHades, King of the Underworld. He had a pure heart, and was gentle and kind to everyone. Alone is capable of fighting for justice and is a pacifist, preferring to resolve issues without violence, resemblingShun. He had demonstrated to be an animal lover as well as a very courageous, as he saved a puppy from the hands of other boys in his village, even giving them his bottle of red paint in order to save the puppy. Additionally, he is also willing to put himself in danger to protect those close to him from harm's way and from dangerous situations. However, despite his kind and understanding nature, Alone does have a limit to his tolerance and is capable of holding grudges, as shown when he harbors hatred forSagittarius Sisyphus, as seen when the god Hades took Alone's body openly claims to sense Alone holding a grudge against Sisyphus Sagittarius, presumably from what Hades managed to see first-hand from Alone's memories, which contained the Sagittarius Gold Saint taking Sasha away from the orphanage. When he became the host of Hades, Alone goes though drastic changes in personality. He becomes much more merciless and sadistic, as seen in Alone's belief in "death as salvation", and he was willing to kill manySaints,Specters, and innocent people for his own purposes. He possesses a menacing and overwhelming dark cosmos that compliments his position as the King of the Underworld's host. Alone goes as far as believing himself to be an evil human, which the Dream GodHypnosagrees with him; admitting he never saw any human as malicious as Alone, before overwhelming and rendering the last bit of Alone's human nature into a state of eternal drowsiness and incapacitation. The possible reason behind why Alone's cruelty was creating a world where there is no war and suffering, which was ironic, since Alone hypocritically murdered many, including hisbest friend, in order to achieve his goal. Out of all the characters in the series, Alone only seems to resentSisyphus, as seen when the Hades took over Alone's body, he was able to sense Alone harboring a large amount of negative emotions against the Sagittarius Saint. During his time as Hades's host, Alone demonstrates an intense authority over theSpecters, expecting them to only follow his orders. He does not approve of disobedience or failure to carry out his commands

characters.name: Alone (ND)
characters.description: AloneGenderMaleClassHostRankHost ofHades Aloneis a young painter andHades's chosen body for his incarnation in the 18th century, as he possesses the purest soul, inSaint Seiya: Next Dimension. The host body of Hades in the 18th century is a young painter called Alone. He first appears in an enclosure located in Germany, called the Champs Elysees, due to its resemblance to theElysiumof theUnderworld.

characters.name: Alraune Queen
characters.description: Alraune QueenAge19GenderMaleDate of birthApril 15NationalityBlack Forest, GermanyAffiliationHadesClassSpectersRankCelestial Star SpectersClothAlraune SurpliceAttacksBlood Flower ScissorsHeight171cmWeight56kgBlood typeBStatusDeceasedVoiced byYūsei Oda Alraune Queen(天魔星アルラウネのクィーン,Tenmasei Aruraune no Kuīn) is one ofHades'Specter. His power lies within theDivine Demonic Star, and he is one of the few exceptional powerful Specters among theUnderworld. He is mostly seen with his companionsHarpy Valentine,Minotauros Gordon,andBasilisk Sylphid. Queen (TLC)

characters.name: Alraune Queen
characters.description: Alraune QueenAge19GenderMaleDate of birthApril 15NationalityBlack Forest, GermanyAffiliationHadesClassSpectersRankCelestial Star SpectersClothAlraune SurpliceAttacksBlood Flower ScissorsHeight171cmWeight56kgBlood typeBStatusDeceasedVoiced byYūsei Oda Alraune Queen(天魔星アルラウネのクィーン,Tenmasei Aruraune no Kuīn) is one ofHades'Specter. characters.name: Altar Hakurei
characters.description: Altar HakureiGenderMaleNationalityTibetAffiliationAthenaClassSaintsRankSilver SaintsClothAltar ClothTrainingJamirFamilyCancer Sage(Twin Brother)Voiced byKenyuu HoriuchiAltar Hakurei isThe Elder brother Cancer Sage, both belong to the people of the continent of Lemuria.He and Cancer Sage led the first part of the Holy WarXV Century. 1496 AD: Hakurei was the Silver Saint of Altar survivor of the previous Holy War. Hishistory has not been well explained.While he and the other saints were holding the Wraith just outside the sanctuary , Sage appeared and told Hakurei to get the enemy to the Temple of Athena , beyond the twelve houses. Altar agreed to it and had confidence in Sage. He led Hades to Athena's temple and so the match was on the steps of the Temple. Sage presumed that at that time he was Athena helping her find her cloth with which they could beat the Wraith and Hades . However when everyone believed that the victory had come, the gods Hypnos and Thanatos appeared killing all the other saints. Hakurei and Sage survived only thanks to their powerful cosmos and the protection of their goddess.  Athena chases Hypnos and Thanatos through The Way of The Gods and nothing was heard of her. She may have succeeded in trapping Hypnos and Thanatos, but we know for sure that she died due to the appearance of Sasha the Athena of the 18th century

characters.name: Altar Nicole
characters.description: Altar NicoleGenderMaleAffiliationAthenaClassSaintsRankSilver SaintsClothAltar ClothStatusDeceasedAltar Nicole(祭壇座(アルター)のニコル,Arutā Nikoru) is the one of the strongest silver saint made ​​his first appearance inGigantomachia. Altar Nicole played the role of patriarch, so ordered by the goddessAthenaduring the Gigantomachy, is one of the early saints, along withAndromeda Shun, watching a giant. Santos is one of the Silver service Athena considered a Sage at the Sanctuary, in Particular has vast knowledge in astronomy, serves as a substitute to the Pope After the vacuum left by the defeat ofGemini Saga. This character only appears in the novel Gigantomachia. His cloth has been designed by Kurumada, published in Book Encyclopedia Saint Seiya (Page 3 dedicated to the armor known to exist). Nicole is frequently described as a serious and calm person. However, during one of the battles against theGigas, it is said that when it comes to protecting Athena, he becomes strict and completely indifferent to the individual needs of the Saints. He also demonstrates a solemn attitude in his duties as the Patriarch’s substitute, always addressing Athena with respect. This is evident when he speaks on her behalf, whether granting the Coma Cloth to Mei or sending Saints on missions from the Pope’s Chamber. However, when he is outside his role in the Sanctuary, Nicole appears as a simple and approachable person, interacting naturally with others—attending the theater with Shun or piloting the plane withSeiyato Sicily.

characters.name: Altar Paris
characters.description: Altar ParisAge14GenderMaleDate of birthAugust 31NationalityPolandAffiliationAthenaClassSaintsRankSilver SaintsClothAltar ClothTrainingAvalon IslandMaster(s)Sir GauvinAttacksProber of SoulGod's Last PrayerHeight170cmWeight56kgBlood typeAParis is a young apprentice Saint came there centuries on the island mythical Avalon. He was sleeping with the other by the spell of Merlin and was awakened by Amfortas, to take part in the crusade against the Sanctuary. His master, Sir Gauvin, the causes and made him the new Saint of Altar Cloth which had remained on the island since the last major Holy Wars.

characters.name: Andreas Lise
characters.description: Andreas LiseGenderMaleNationalityAsgardAffiliationOdin(Initially)Loki(under his control)RankRepresentative of OdinStatusDeceasedVoiced byTomokazu Seki Andreas Liseis the central antagonist inSaint Seiya: Soul of Gold. Initially, he was the doctor atValhalla Palace, but Andreas was possessed by the false godLoki. Andreas is a tall man with a lead build. He has long red hair that covers his left eye. When possessed by Loki, his hair color turned purple. For majority of the series, he wears a full body white robe, gold shoulder guards, and a blue cape. Towards the people of Asgard, Andreas gave the appearance of a kind, understanding, and caring person who was more than willing to give the Asgardian citizens what they wanted for an easier life even if it was through methods said to be forbidden. However, he is actually highly calculating and manipulative. He is well aware of his actions and became more cruel when he was revealed to be possessed byLoki.

characters.name: Andromeda Shaun (Netflix Series)
characters.description: ShaunAge17GenderFemaleDate of birthSeptember 9Astrological signVirgoNationalityJapaneseHair colorGreenEye colorGreenAffiliationKnights of AthenaClassBronze KnightConstellation / starAndromedaMaster(s)Phoenix NeroAttacksNebula ChainHeight167 cmWeight50 KgFamilyPhoenix Nero (brother)StatusAliveVoiced byLuci ChristianAndromeda Shaunis one of the Knights ofAthenain Netflix's animated seriesSAINT SEIYA: Knights of the Zodiac. First taught how to fight by her older brother,Nero, and later trained onAndromeda Island, she is theBronze Knightof the constellation Andromeda. Abandoned when she was little by her parents, her only relative is her older brother. Her signature technique is the Nebula Chain. Shaun is an athletic young woman in her mid-teens with shaggy green hair, emerald eyes, peach-colored skin, and delicate features. HerAndromeda armoris two tones of pink and features scalloped pauldrons over her shoulders. Her casual attire is a green shirt, white overalls, thigh-high black socks, and brown knee-length boots. She typically holds herself with a guarded, reserved stance both in and out of combat. Shaun is a warrior dedicated to peace, justice, and the preservation of life, and as such does not care much for fighting or violence. Her Nebula Chains are symbolic of her nature: holding and binding her enemies and bringing them down with an electric shock rather than being used as weapons of war, they remain her shield. However, when pressed into battle, Shaun is collected, ruthless, and outright dangerous, holding nothing back in the defense of life. Shaun is a warrior dedicated to peace, justice, and the preservation of life, and as such does not care much for fighting or violence. Her Nebula Chains are symbolic of her nature: holding and binding her enemies and bringing them down with an electric shock rather than being used as weapons of war, they remain her shield. However, when pressed into battle, Shaun is collected, ruthless, and outright dangerous, holding nothing back in the defense of life. Shaun is rather secure, knowing that she is among the strongest of the Bronze Knights despite comments regarding her place as the only female among those who assembled for theGalaxian Warstournament. Shaun is known to be playful with her friends and rivals, tending to tease them in moments of calm, such as pointing outUnicorn Jab's attempts to flirt withSienna Kido.

characters.name: Andromeda Shun
characters.description: See also:Andromeda Shaun (Netflix Series) ShunAge13-16GenderMaleDate of birthSeptember 9Astrological signVirgoNationalityJapaneseAffiliationAthenaClassSaintsRankBronze Saints, Host of HadesClothAndromeda ClothAndromeda New ClothAndromeda Plain ClothAndromeda Kamui ClothTrainingAndromeda Island (near Somalia)Master(s)Cepheus Daidalos(master, manga-only)Cepheus Albiore(master, anime-only)AttacksNebula ChainRolling DefenseAndromeda NebulaCircle DefenseWild TrapSpiral DuctSpider NetBoomerang ShotCasting NetGreat CaptureThunder WaveNebula StreamNebula StormHeight165cmWeight51kgFamilyPhoenix Ikki(Brother)Cygnus Hyoga(half-brother)Pegasus Seiya(half-brother)Dragon Shiryu(Half-brotther)Unicorn Jabu(Half-brother)Mitsumasa Kido(father)StatusAliveVoiced byRyō HorikawaYūta Kasuya (Hades)Yumi Tōma (child)Tomoka Endō (Hades, child)Chris Patton (English-ADV version) Andromeda Shun(アンドロメダ星座の瞬,Andoromeda no Shun?), also known asShun,literally meaning 'twinkle, instant', is one of theBronze Saints. He is arguably one of the strongest in the series, although his gentle disposition and kind nature tend to prevent him from using his true power, unless he is forced to do so. Shun is a pacifist, and the most reluctant of the Bronze Saints when a situation must be resolved by violence. He is a merciful soul by nature, and a firm believer in solving problems without causing bloodshed. This creates a sharp contrast between himself and the rest of theSaints: Whereas the others will not hesitate to battle when the situation demands it, Shun only allows himself to fight if it's an absolute necessity, or when his almost endless patience wears out. When this is the case, Shun can become an extremely skilled and deadly fighter. His kindness also letsCharonabandon the attack and his sorrow distractsLuneunintentionally soKanoncan mind control Lune. Shun is shown as a competent and tough, if unwilling, fighter and opponent. In 'Sanctuary', he manages to hold his own againstGemini Saga, and even manages to killPisces Aphrodite, both of themGold Saints. He is the second of the Bronze Saints to achieve his God Cloth. Though he may be adverse to fighting, he will fight when he is required to, and is just as powerful or skilled as any of the other main Bronze Saints.

This creates a sharp contrast between himself and the rest of theSaints: Whereas the others will not hesitate to battle when the situation demands it, Shun only allows himself to fight if it's an absolute necessity, or when his almost endless patience wears out. When this is the case, Shun can become an extremely skilled and deadly fighter. His kindness also letsCharonabandon the attack and his sorrow distractsLuneunintentionally soKanoncan mind control Lune. Shun is shown as a competent and tough, if unwilling, fighter and opponent. In 'Sanctuary', he manages to hold his own againstGemini Saga, and even manages to killPisces Aphrodite, both of themGold Saints. He is the second of the Bronze Saints to achieve his God Cloth. Though he may be adverse to fighting, he will fight when he is required to, and is just as powerful or skilled as any of the other main Bronze Saints.

characters.name: Andromeda Shun (Omega)
characters.description: Andromeda ShunAge38 (season 1)39 (season 2)GenderMaleDate of birthSeptember 9NationalityJapanAffiliationAthenaClassSaintsRankLegendary SaintsBronze SaintsClothAndromeda Cloth StoneAndromeda New ClothTrainingAndromeda IslandMaster(s)Cepheus AlbiorAttacksNebula ChainThunder WaveAndromeda NebulaRolling DefenseNebula StreamNebula StormFamilyPhoenix Ikki (Omega)(brother)StatusActiveVoiced byHiroshi KamiyaAndromeda Shun is the legendary Andromeda Bronze Saint, who fought alongside Sagittarius Seiya to protect Athena from fearsome foes years ago. Shun can use the element of Wind. Main Article:Andromeda Shun After a period of peace, in Mars showed and attacked Athena. Shun protect the latter returned with his companions Seiya, Hyoga, Shiryu, and Ikki. In addition to the God of War, the Saints had to Legendary measure the bodyguard of the latter, the Four Heavenly Kings, shun and Hyoga faced Diana. While Mars seemed to be on the verge of losing a meteorite crashed into Earth, releasing a power that changed the appearance of Cloths and housed them in Clostones, giving the Saints and Martians control elements.

characters.name: Angels
characters.description: AngelsGenderMaleNationalityHeavenAffiliationArtemisClothGlory TheAngels(天闘士,Enjeru) are the chosen warriors of the Olympian Gods. Their armors are named Glories (天 衣,Gurōrī). They are also some of most powerful foesAthena'sBronze Saintshave ever faced not counting the Gods. The Cloths ofSeiya,ShiryuandHyogaare all more or less destroyed in their respective battles against the Angels duringTenkai-hen Jōsomovie, despite being the most powerful Cloths, those reborn withAthena's blood. They appear also inNext Dimensionmanga, but only Toma has appeared so far, but he wears the Sleep Angel Glory instead of the Icarus Glory.Masami Kurumadatalked about Angels in an interview where he was asked details on the possible Heaven Chapter and he said to have in mind to create warriors that may have been even stronger than the 3 Judges of Hell to make them fight against theBronze Saintsafter the Hades Chapter that have gotten a lot stronger awakening theEighth Sense, and they would have been the Angels. After the appearance inTenkai-hen Jōso, he officially included Toma inSaint Seiya: The Next Dimension. There is no information on the training of these warriors. However, seeing as they are at an higher level than aGold Saintand possibly even higher than the 3 Judges of Hell, their training must have been intense, unless they may have climbed the divine ranks during past battles or some of them may have been born divine already.

characters.name: Anna
characters.description: AnnaGenderFemaleNationalityItalyVoiced byRisa Shimizu Anna(アンナ,Anna), Maria and Caro are three supporting characters inSaint Seiya: The Lost Canvas - The Myth of Hades. They are three young children who grew up in the same orphanage asPegasus Tenma, who holds them close to his heart. They are killed byAloneafter he draws their portraits.
